raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (center of table)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box is centered and reachable by both arms; the left and right sides of the box are unobstructed so both end-effectors can establish opposing lateral contacts. The table edges and robot wrists have sufficient clearance to avoid collision during inward squeeze and lift.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held in a stable two-handed pinch from the left and right sides and is no longer resting on the table (lifted slightly above the tabletop)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box is centered and reachable by both arms; the left and right sides of the box are unobstructed so both end-effectors can establish opposing lateral contacts. The table edges and robot wrists have sufficient clearance to avoid collision during inward squeeze and lift.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held in a stable two-handed pinch from the left and right sides and is no longer resting on the table (lifted slightly above the tabletop).
